title: log_configuration API spec for ContainerCreateLibpod is not correct
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**
`log_configuration` object spec according to the syntax described in API docs: https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/containers/operation/ContainerCreateLibpod is wrong


<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman inspect $(curl -s --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock  -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"Image":"alpine","log_configuration":{"Type":"k8s-file","Config":{"max-size":"1000k"}}}' http://d/v4.0.0/libpod/containers/create | jq -r .Id)`

**Describe the results you received:**
```
  "LogConfig": {
      "Type": "journald",
      "Config": null,
      "Path": "",
      "Tag": "",
      "Size": "0B"
  },
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
```
  "LogConfig": {
      "Type": "k8s-file",
      "Config": null,
      "Path": "/var/home/core/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/53cc2307e450a45617b2591781c1a8ecf62c2c38bae525ffc6566c109b3b4181/userdata/ctr.log",
      "Tag": "",
      "Size": "1000k"
  }
```

**Additional information you deem important:**
```
podman inspect $(curl -s --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock  -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"Image":"alpine","log_configuration":{"Driver":"k8s-file","Size":1000000}}' http://d/v4.0.0/libpod/containers/create | jq -r .Id)
```
Works OK.


**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.1
API Version:  4.1.1
Go Version:   go1.18.3
Built:        Wed Jun 22 16:17:44 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


No

comments.body: @containers/podman-maintainers https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/30cc6dbf085e56c3d67341962e79efacdab3e524/pkg/specgen/specgen.go#L17-L31 does not match https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/containers/operation/ContainerCreateLibpod .. not sure on which side we have the wrong type
@TomSweeneyRedHat do you know if there is a way to check how the docs at podman.io will be impacted by a PR? specifically the API docs
@cdoern you need to install [go-swagger](https://github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger) and then use `make pkg/api/swagger.yaml` and then `swagger serve pkg/api/swagger.yaml`
@Luap99 I am getting `make: swagger: No such file or directory` do I have to be in a certain directory?
I was using a container aliased to swagger, I'll download the binary
